persistenceNote: V1 Launch Ready on Netlify Blobs + durable JSON — Postgres not required for this checklist.
registrationNote: V1 registration is invitation-accept (/invite/[token] + /start). Public open signup remains gated.

missionQuestions.question: How do I get involved?
missionQuestions.notes: Invite accept → choose place → My Network

pillars.name: Every Post-Secondary School Exists
pillars.notes: 67 institutions — all post-secondary types; 75 counties covered

pillars.name: Every Public High School Exists
pillars.notes: 272 public high schools from ADE — all 75 counties

pillars.name: Every Private & Charter School Exists
pillars.notes: 145 private + 102 charter schools from ADE — 51 counties with schools

pillars.name: Every Participant Has a Home
pillars.notes: Auto network board + share slug + QR on invite accept

pillars.name: Organizing Works
pillars.notes: Join via invite, share/recruit, home place honor system

pillars.name: Administration
pillars.notes: Workbench participants list + growth/outreach on Blobs

checklist.item: Every AR post-secondary school type represented (4-year, 2-year, technical, trade)
Every public high school in every county has a profile
Every private school and charter school in Arkansas has a profile
Referral links and QR codes function

summary.note: LS-CHK 10/10; checklist also includes items 11–12 school coverage (done)
